verdict: Google Pixel 9 Pro is our top recommendation for camera phone with pure android experience. Best-in-class point-and-shoot camera. Tensor G4 chip behind Snapdragon.

faqs.answer: Yes, the Google Pixel 9 Pro justifies its price with best-in-class point-and-shoot camera. We recommend it for users who prioritize camera phone.
